dup_exposure.use_case: Replace ad-hoc pub-sub in crates/phenotype-event-bus and agileplus/crates/agileplus-* with canonical bus; event-bus crate already in workspace but should be deprecated in favor of external
crates/phenotype-event-sourcing (hash-chained SQLite) duplicates PhenoObservability's tracely-core; consolidate to a single event-store crate
crates/phenotype-errors + crates/phenotype-error-core + crates/phenotype-error-macros (3 crates) overlap; phenotype-error-core from external lib is sufficient
Add request-ID propagation to axum routes (agileplus-api/src/router.rs, agileplus-dashboard/src/main.rs) and chi middleware (templates/go)
Centralize deny.toml + cargo-deny/audit/semver-checks policy across 3 separate workflows (cargo-deny.yml, cargo-audit.yml, cargo-semver-checks.yml)
crates/phenotype-project-registry should consume external registry lib instead of being a self-contained implementation
tower-http/trace + tracing-actix-web wiring in agileplus-api could route through shared postfx middleware
journey-gate.yml + journey-gate in AgilePlus should consume the external journeys lib (not duplicate journey step types)
justfile + Taskfile.yml + process-compose.yml + .pre-commit-config.yaml + .githooks/ + Brewfile could be consolidated via phenotype.just / phenotype.task / phenotype.precommit library extensions
Workspace members in agileplus/Cargo.toml duplicate trait crate definitions that should come from phenotype-shared
AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md + harnesses/{CLAUDE-CODE,CODEX,CURSOR}.md overlap; consolidate under skills lib
README.md + AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md in sub-projects + ADR_REGISTRY.md duplicate onboarding material
feat/iconography-sprite branch + template icons could consume the shared icon set
Dockerfile.rust + Dockerfile.python + templates/*/Dockerfile could share base images

sota_gaps: Cross-repo refactoring tool missing — HexaKit is the shelf root for 30+ Pheno repos; the recommended AST-based multi-repo refactorer (REC-006, SOTA.md L1822) is unimplemented
Unified dependency dashboard absent — Cargo.lock per-project; no shelf-level dep drift visualization (REC-007, SOTA.md L1830)
Automated worklog generation not present — worklogs are hand-maintained; agent context lost between sessions (Gap 3 in SOTA.md L1732; REC-008)
Agent MCP server sprawl — 3+ MCP servers (agileplus-mcp, thegent-mcp, helios-mcp) each with their own JSON-RPC patterns; no shared mcp-server crate beyond crates/phenotype-mcp
No 'phenotype-contracts' federation — proto/contracts under agileplus are duplicated by templates/hexagon/contracts approach (PHASE2_SETUP text vs PHASE1 text)
Domain-squatter crates linger — crates/cipher and crates/focalpoint are excluded from workspace but their dirs persist (similar pattern to NFR-OBS-010 in PhenoObservability)
Workspace members list has duplicate entries (phenotype-security-aggregator, phenotype-test-infra, phenotype-time, phenotype-validation all listed twice in Cargo.toml:16-70)
Renovate and Dependabot coexist (.github/dependabot.yml + renovate.json5 at root) — two tools doing the same job, drift risk
CHANGELOG.md is sparse (1 release entry 2026-04-29) vs 450 commits — release automation works (cliff.toml present) but releases are not cut
No 'audit-locked' policy in lib versions — phenotype-config-core path-dep (`libs/phenotype-config-core`) is not version-pinned; future breakage risk for PhenoObservability git-dep consumer
axum + actix-web co-exist (axum 0.7 for HTTP server crates, tracing-actix-web 4 middleware) — dual framework risk; consider axum-only or tower-only for new crates
templates/*/ + template-* are duplicated (templates/{rust,python,go,typescript}/ vs template-rust, template-python, template-go, template-typescript at root)
Cargo.toml.bak is committed in the repo root — backup file in version control is an anti-pattern
Helm of tracking branches (>15 'chore/' branches as of 2026-06-08: hygiene-bundle, identity-rename, dependabot-groups, etc.) — branch hygiene is itself a gap

Working tree was clean at branch-cut time (a 'hygiene: bulk commit' landed on main at 2026-06-08T19:41:56 after initial audit read), so the 20+ uncommitted files noted earlier in the session are now in af43f35
convergence_rationale: Rust core (46 crates workspace) + Python packages (pheno-agents, pheno-atoms, pheno-core, pheno-llm, pheno-mcp, phenosdk) + Go templates (go-chi/chi v5) + TypeScript templates (vitest + eslint) + protobuf contracts (buf.gen.yaml). Acts as the cross-stack foundation/shelf for the entire Phenotype ecosystem, consumed by PhenoObservability via git dep. SOTA.md explicitly calls it 'shelf organization' (L229). Multi-stack by composition, convergence-by-purpose.

action_items.title: Deduplicate workspace members and remove the 2 excluded-yet-present crates
action_items.why: Cargo.toml:16-70 lists phenotype-security-aggregator, phenotype-test-infra, phenotype-time, phenotype-validation twice each; crates/cipher and crates/focalpoint are excluded (L13-14) but dirs persist (the latter is a 867MB bloat). Single-pass cleanup before next dep-bump cuts 5+ rebuild hotspots.

action_items.title: Consolidate event-sourcing + errors into the external phenotype-event-sourcing and phenotype-errors libs
action_items.why: crates/phenotype-event-sourcing (hash-chained SQLite), crates/phenotype-event-bus, and the 3-crate error stack (phenotype-errors, phenotype-error-core, phenotype-error-macros) duplicate functionality already provided by PhenoObservability (tracely-core) and shared-errors. Removing these cuts ~8 workspace members and aligns HexaKit with the single-source-of-truth direction in PHENOSDK_EXTRACTION_STRATEGY.md.

action_items.title: Choose one HTTP framework (axum OR actix-web) and migrate the other to it
action_items.why: Workspace pulls axum 0.7 + axum-extra 0.9 (Cargo.toml:148-149) AND tracing-actix-web 4 (Cargo.toml:165). agileplus-api uses axum (router.rs); agileplus-plane uses actix (webhook.rs). Pick one stack for the API surface; the other should be deprecated to a single port/adapter pair. Convergence claim is only credible if HTTP stack is single.

action_items.title: Apply phenotype-dep-guard + phenotype-just to retire duplicate CI / task infra
action_items.why: 49 workflows in .github/workflows/ + justfile + Taskfile.yml + process-compose.yml + .pre-commit-config.yaml + Brewfile + .githooks/ is a configuration sprawl. The external phenotype.just + phenotype.precommit libs (already adopted by PhenoObservability per ad3f212) can collapse 15+ workflows into reusable libraries.

action_items.title: Cut the first release (v0.2.0) using cliff + release-drafter and prune stale branches
action_items.why: Workspace package version 0.2.0 (Cargo.toml:2) + cliff.toml present + release-drafter workflow present + 450 commits but only 1 CHANGELOG entry (2026-04-29). Branch hygiene: 15+ open chore/* branches (cargo-keywords, dependabot-groups, editorconfig-align, hygiene-bundle, identity-rename, tokio-tighten, workflow-hygiene-ubuntu-24, workspace-fix, etc.). Cutting v0.2.0 with cliff + archiving 14 stale branches is the single highest-impact convergence signal.

metadata.uncommitted_modified_files_at_audit: 20+ files across Metron/, Traceon/, crates/phenotype-analytics/, crates/phenotype-bdd/, crates/phenotype-config-loader/ (observed at initial head 44cf472; resolved by af43f35 'hygiene: bulk commit' before branch cut — not in this commit)
